strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators aligns with required AI agent development
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, Vitest-era tooling, founded test runner project)
concerns: Limited explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin experience not demonstrated; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms work ~2016-2018)
Cloud/containerization signal is light — Docker and Kubernetes mentioned briefly but no deep AWS/GCP/Azure architecture detail beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years, deep TypeScript/Node/React experience, and directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure work, making them a strong fit for the role's primary stack and emerging AI requirements. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js and current Kotlin/Java usage, and cloud platform depth is only partially evidenced, but the overall engineering breadth, testing discipline, and architectural exposure suggest a solid match for an internal automation tooling team.
